common.appTitle: ดึ๋งปุ๊ Idle Game
common.appDescription: A solo-character idle MMORPG-lite — level up, allocate stats, cast skills, challenge bosses, and change classes to keep growing stronger.

ladder.hallOfFameHint: View the Hall of Fame leaderboard

levelUp.progress: Lv.{level} → Lv.{gate} unlocks the class-change quest

classQuest.readyHint: Quest complete! See the skill bar below to change class.

zoneBoss.farmingHint: Kill enemies to unlock the next zone
zoneBoss.readyHint: The boss-room door is open — walk in and challenge it!
zoneBoss.townHint: Resting in town - head out to hunt toward the next unlock
zoneBoss.freeFarmHint: This zone is already cleared - free-farm for loot and levels
zoneBoss.victoryHint: Walk into the next map to keep growing stronger.

panels.skillAriaLabel: {heroName}: {skillName}{status, select, dead { (dead)} cooldown { (cooldown {seconds}s)} nomana { (no mana)} other {}}
panels.autoSlotToggleHint: Toggle this skill into a free auto-cast slot

classQuest.ariaProgress: {heroName}: class-change quest — {kills}/{goal} kills, boss {boss, select, done {defeated} other {pending}}
classQuest.ariaChange: {heroName}: change class{state, select, confirm { (tap again to confirm)} other {}}

stats.title: Stats
stats.pointsTitle: Unspent stat points — tap + to allocate

bot.title: Helper bots
bot.hint: The bot warps to town on its own when your bags fill up or potions run low, then walks back to farming automatically.
bot.goldReserveHint: The bot will always leave at least this much gold (not a spending budget)

autoSell.title: Auto-dispose drops
autoSell.keepBetterStat: Protect good gear (upgrades over equipped + best piece for an empty slot)

welcome.title: Welcome, {className}!
welcome.body: Your character just picked the {className} class. It hunts the mobs scattered across the field automatically — your job is to spend stat points, cast skills, and take it to the boss to keep growing stronger. Let's take a look!

watchFight.title: Let your hero fight
watchFight.body: Your hero attacks enemies on its own. Every kill banks gold, and the bar below fills up toward the boss.

allocateStats.title: Spend stat points on level-up
allocateStats.body: Every level-up grants 3 stat points to allocate yourself (STR/DEX/INT/VIT). Tap the + button on a stat here to spend one, or flip on "Auto Stat" to let the system allocate for you.

castSkill.title: Cast a skill yourself
castSkill.body: Each skill costs mana plus a cooldown. Tap a skill button once you have enough mana and its cooldown is up for a big burst of damage!

slotAutoSkill.title: Slot a skill into auto-cast
slotAutoSkill.body: Tap the "+ Auto" badge under a skill to drop it into an auto-cast slot (up to 3, unlocked by level). Skills outside a slot still need a manual tap.

bossChallenge.title: Challenge the map boss
bossChallenge.body: Fill each zone's hunt quota to unlock the next zone. At the last zone the boss-room door opens — walk in to duel the boss and unlock the next map!

settingsTour.title: Tune your play here
settingsTour.body: Tap "⚙ Settings" to mute/unmute sound, switch languages, or tune auto-behavior, and tap "📖 Guide" to reopen the game guide anytime from this row.

outro.title: You're ready!
outro.body: That's the whole core loop: kill → bank XP/gold → spend stats & skills → challenge the boss → grow stronger, on repeat. Enjoy the adventure!

heroDeathRespawn.title: Don't worry when a hero goes down!
heroDeathRespawn.body: A downed hero auto-revives after a short timer — no button to tap, just wait for them to get back up and keep fighting.

autoCastAvailable.title: Try auto-cast for your skills
autoCastAvailable.body: A skill is ready. Slot it into an auto-cast slot (tap "+ Auto") and flip on "Auto Skill" — your hero will cast slotted skills automatically the instant they're ready.

questOffered.title: Class-change quest available!
questOffered.body: Your hero hit the level gate for the class-change quest. Tap "Accept quest" next to the level badge to start it.

questComplete.title: Quest complete!
questComplete.body: Objectives done. Tap "Change class!" (tap again to confirm) to advance to the next class tier with a new skill.

autoSlotUnlocked.title: New auto-cast slot unlocked!
autoSlotUnlocked.body: Your hero unlocked another auto-cast slot. Tap "+ Auto" under a skill to fill the new slot.

statPointsPiling.title: Stat points are piling up
statPointsPiling.body: You've got several unspent stat points saved up. Tap + to allocate them, or flip on "Auto Stat" to let the system spend them for you.

stageClear.title: Boss down! Stage cleared.
stageClear.body: Tap "Next stage" to push into a tougher stage and keep leveling up.

bossWipe.title: Your hero got wiped — but it's not over!
bossWipe.body: Your hero revives in town with no penalty and goes back to hunting. Spend a few more stat points or grind a bit more, then challenge the boss again.

manualPlayHint.title: You can play manually now!
manualPlayHint.body: Tap the ground to walk, tap a monster to attack. Tap "✕ Cancel Command" to stop, or turn AUTO back on to let your hero hunt on its own again.

tier3QuestOffered.title: Tier-3 class quest available!
tier3QuestOffered.body: Your evolved hero hit the level gate for its final class-change quest. Tap "Accept quest" next to the level badge to start it.

skill4Unlocked.title: 4th skill slot unlocked!
skill4Unlocked.body: Class Tier 3 opened a new auto-cast slot for your ultimate skill. Tap "+ Auto" under it to fill the new slot.

coreLoop.title: Kill → bank XP/gold → grow stronger → boss
coreLoop.body: Your hero hunts the scattered field mobs on its own, all the time. Every kill banks XP (level-ups + stat points) and gold, and pushes the hunt tally toward the next zone unlock. Cast skills to speed things up and walk the world as you grow.

characterSlots.title: Characters & 3 slots
characterSlots.body: Each account can create up to 3 characters, each locked to a starting class (Sword/Bow/Magic) chosen at creation. Switch between them anytime from the characters page (the "Switch character" button in the settings row).

baseStats.title: Base stats (STR/DEX/INT/VIT)
baseStats.body: Every level-up grants 3 stat points to spend yourself — STR boosts melee attack, DEX boosts ranged attack + attack speed, INT boosts magic attack and mana, VIT boosts max HP. Turn on "Auto Stat" to let the system allocate for you. There's no gold-bought upgrade line anymore — a hero's power comes purely from level + stats + class/skills.

manaSkills.title: Mana, skills & auto slots
manaSkills.body: Skills cost mana (fed by INT) plus a cooldown. Each class tier learns 2-3 skills, unlocked by level. Tap a skill to cast it yourself, or drop it into an auto-cast slot with "+ Auto" (up to 3 slots, unlocked at Lv 1/15/30) — skills left outside a slot still need a manual tap.

classQuest.title: Class-change quest
classQuest.body: At Lv.15 the game auto-offers a class-change quest — accept it, then defeat 60 enemies and 1 boss. Once complete, tap "Change class!" (tap again to confirm) to advance to the next class tier with a new skill and a permanent power boost.

hero-swordsman.body: The Swordsman is your melee frontliner — auto-attacks whatever's directly in front, and learns more special skills as it levels, usable once cooldown and mana are ready (tap the skill button on the skill bar, or slot it into auto-cast).

hero-archer.body: The Archer attacks at range with arrows — fast and precise — and learns more special skills as it levels, usable once cooldown and mana are ready (tap the skill button on the skill bar, or slot it into auto-cast).

hero-mage.body: The Mage deals area-of-effect magic damage, great against grouped-up enemies, and learns more special skills as it levels, usable once cooldown and mana are ready (tap the skill button on the skill bar, or slot it into auto-cast).

boss.title: Challenging the map boss
boss.body: The goal card under the arena shows a bar comparing your power to the recommendation. Fill every zone's hunt quota and the boss-room door at the end of the map opens — walk in to duel. If your hero dies the boss retreats, you revive in town with no penalty, hunting resumes, and you can walk right back in. Winning pays a big gold reward and unlocks the next map.

autoCast.title: ✨ Auto Skill
autoCast.body: When on, your hero automatically casts whatever skills are slotted into its auto-cast slots the instant cooldown and mana are ready. Up to 3 slots unlock by level (Lv 1/15/30) — no need to tap the skill buttons yourself.

autoAllocate.title: 🎯 Auto Stat
autoAllocate.body: When on, the system spends stat points from level-ups for you automatically (favoring your class's main stat) — no need to tap + yourself.

offlineIdle.title: Offline gold
offlineIdle.body: Close the game and come back later — it automatically calculates the progress you would have made while away (capped at 8 hours per session) and hands you the banked gold as soon as you return.

gear.title: Drops & Gear
gear.body: Enemies and bosses have a chance to drop weapons/armor to collect. Each item has a tier and rarity (common/rare/epic). Open your Inventory (🎒) to equip one weapon + one armor — some pieces require a matching class.

worldMaps.title: 6 maps, 30 stages
worldMaps.body: The world spans 6 maps (Human World -> Demon Realm -> Wild Frontier -> Frozen Tundra -> Desert Ruins -> Infernal City), each with 5 farm zones + a boss room. Clear a map's boss to unlock the next one; maps 4-6 (Grand Expansion) open once your hero reaches Class Tier 3.

classTier3.title: Tier-3 class change (Grand Expansion)
classTier3.body: At Lv.40 a second class-change quest unlocks: hunt in the Wild Frontier map plus re-defeat the Demon Realm boss. Completing it advances your hero to its final class tier — a huge power spike, a 4th skill, and a 4th auto-cast slot, the key to breaking through the stage-15 wall.

boss-map4.title: Glacial Sovereign (stage 20) — Charge
boss-map4.body: The frozen tundra's boss telegraphs a dash toward your position, then rushes in for a heavy hit — watch the telegraph and be ready to take the charge or reposition.

boss-map5.title: Buried Pharaoh (stage 25) — Summon
boss-map5.body: As its HP drops, the desert ruins' boss calls in waves of adds to fight alongside it — clear the summons quickly so they don't pile up.

boss-map6.title: Infernal Sovereign (stage 30) — Field Hazard
boss-map6.body: The hell city's boss unleashes a telegraphed arena-wide hazard wave that damages you no matter where you stand — heal up and out-DPS it before the strike lands.

swordsman.name: Whirl Slash
swordsman.desc: Spins the blade to hit every foe in range

archer.name: Arrow Rain
archer.desc: Rains arrows across the whole battlefield

mage.name: Meteor
mage.desc: Calls down a meteor strike on the area

sword_whirl.name: Whirl Slash
sword_whirl.desc: Spins the blade to hit every foe in range

sword_warcry.name: War Cry
sword_warcry.desc: A rallying shout that boosts your attack for a while

sword_quake.name: Earthquake
sword_quake.desc: Slams the ground for heavy area damage ahead

archer_rain.name: Arrow Rain
archer_rain.desc: Rains arrows across the whole battlefield

archer_powershot.name: Power Shot
archer_powershot.desc: A single devastating arrow — the boss-buster

archer_barrage.name: Explosive Shot
archer_barrage.desc: An explosive arrow that bursts over a cluster

mage_meteor.name: Meteor
mage_meteor.desc: Calls down a meteor strike on the area

mage_frostnova.name: Frost Nova
mage_frostnova.desc: A quick, cheap frost blast for clearing packs

mage_cataclysm.name: Cataclysm
mage_cataclysm.desc: A colossal meteor — the ultimate burst

sword_skyfall.name: Skyfall Strike
sword_skyfall.desc: Freezes time for an instant, then crashes down with an earth-shattering strike across the field

archer_storm.name: Arrow Storm
archer_storm.desc: A relentless storm of arrows rains across the whole field for several seconds

mage_apocalypse.name: Apocalypse
mage_apocalypse.desc: Darkens the sky and calls down a volley of meteors — the end of the world

characters.pageSubtitle: Pick a character to play, or create a new one (up to 3 per account)
characters.emptyBody: Create your first character to start the adventure!

card.selectError: Couldn't select this character — try again

delete.title: Delete "{name}"?
delete.warning: This cannot be undone — the character and all its progress will be permanently lost.

create.title: Create a New Character

swordsman.playstyle: Wades into melee range with a blade — tough and hard-hitting.

archer.playstyle: Fires arrows from range — fast and precise.

mage.playstyle: Casts spells that shred grouped-up enemies.

create.nameHint: 2-24 characters, Thai/English letters and digits only (no spaces or symbols)

nameError.tooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters
nameError.tooLong: Name must be at most 24 characters
nameError.invalidChars: Only Thai/English letters and digits are allowed

create.limitError: You already have the maximum of 3 characters
create.duplicateError: That name is already taken — try another
create.genericError: Couldn't create the character — try again

world.lockedTooltip: Locked — clear this zone’s quota first
world.frontier: End of the frontier for now

shop.title: Town Shop
shop.subtitle: Stock up before you head out
shop.returnScrollAria: Use a Return Scroll to teleport to town ({count} left)

announcements.landedMax: 🔥 {charName} landed a +{level} on {itemName}! The whole server bows down!

notices.botSelling: 💰 Bot is selling at the shop...
notices.botReturning: 🏃 Bot is heading back to the farm...
notices.autoSellNothing: Bag is full but the auto-sell rules matched nothing - adjust them in Settings or sell manually; the sell-trip bot is paused for now

fastTravelBlocked.aggro: A mob is engaged with you — can't warp
fastTravelBlocked.dead: Your hero is down — can't warp

refine.title: Refine Station
refine.emptyHint: Nothing to refine in this slot

band.safe: Safe — nothing is lost on a miss

items.refine: ⚒️ Refine (+N gear) is here! Salvage unused gear into materials, then try your luck at the town refine station — +1 to +3 are safe, +4+ can fail and drop a level, +8+ risks shattering!
items.manualPlay: 👆 Manual control is in: tap the ground to move, tap a monster to attack (try turning AUTO off)
items.skills: ✨ Big skills hit even harder — tier-2 ultimates now cover the whole screen! Monster fields are denser, so bring mana potions along
items.bot: 🤖 The bot got smarter: set each rarity to sell for gold or salvage into refine materials (in Settings)
items.autoAllocate: 📊 New auto-allocate: stat points now go where your class actually needs them, no more scattergun spending
items.prestige: 🔥 +8/+9/+10 gear now flaunts an escalating divine aura — hit +10 and the whole field will know it
items.announce: 📣 Land a +8 or higher and the WHOLE server hears about it — get ready to show off!
items.intShare: 🧪 Swordsman/Archer now auto-invest some INT — mana potion burden cut by more than half
items.catchUp: ⏰ Switch tabs or fold your phone as long as you like — the game now catches up all your progress when you return
items.botFix: 🛠 Fixed the bot reaching town but refusing to sell/salvage — every trip now completes its chores
items.kiteFix: 🏹 Archer/Mage now glide smoothly while kiting — no more jittery bouncing
items.statTapFix: 👆 Stat + buttons now register every tap with instant feedback — mash away
items.botTrip: 🏃 The bot works harder: one town trip now clears every chore you enabled — potions, selling, and salvaging in a single visit

items.autoAdvance: 🚶 New! Auto-advance — quota done, walk straight into the next zone (toggle in Settings)
items.classAura: 🔥 Epic weapon auras now match your class — crimson blade / emerald bow / azure staff
items.gaugeFix: 🔓 Zone-unlock gauge no longer resets on warps/town trips/logout — remembered per zone
items.bossGateFix: ⚔ The challenge button only lights up at the real boss door — no more dead glowing button
items.copySweep: 📝 Goal/tutorial copy fully updated to the hunting-field + boss-door model

items.world: 🗺 The world just DOUBLED! 3 new maps — Ice Tundra · Desert Ruins · Hell City (stages 16-30) + level cap raised to 90
items.tier3: 👑 Class tier 3 is here! Grand Knight / Hunt King / Archmage — quest at Lv.40, a power spike that breaks the stage-15 wall
items.skill4: ⚡ A spectacular 4th skill per tier-3 class — Skyfall Blade (time stops!) / Relentless Arrow Storm / Apocalypse
items.slot4: ✨ 4th auto-skill slot unlocks with class tier 3
items.gear: 🛡 Gear tiers 7-10 drop in the new stages — stronger everything, refine to a new ceiling
items.boss: 😈 All 6 bosses now look unique + new bosses fight dirty: charging rush / summoned minions / arena-wide shockwaves — watch the warning signs!
items.codex: 📖 Codex covers the new world, tier-3 classes, and every new boss
items.warpFix: 🌀 Picking a warp zone now closes the window — see your warp instantly
items.modalFix: 📱 Mobile fix: inventory/refine/settings windows no longer get covered by HUD buttons

hof.notOpenYet: The Hall of Fame isn't open yet
